name: toolkit
description: Codex-ready handoff, claim-check, qa-sweep, code-quality-review, and doc-to-html skills and bundled agent files (reviewers + ci-watcher) from Agent Workshop.

interface.shortDescription: Review handoff and doc-to-html skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex manifest for the Agent Workshop toolkit plugin. Codex exposes the handoff-review, handoff-pr, handoff-goal, doc-to-html, claim-check, qa-sweep, code-quality-review, and get-pr-comments skills from this package; the agent files (the reviewers plus ci-watcher) are bundled in the payload for Claude Code and reference, but Codex standalone custom agents still need repo-local .codex/agents wrappers.
defaultPrompt: Turn a markdown report into a standalone HTML page.
Investigate whether a ticket or claim still holds.
Run a team-scale QA sweep over a release and corroborate the findings.
Run a strict code quality review on the current branch.
Summarize the active PR's review comments into a prioritized action list.
Explain how to install reviewer agents for Codex.
